utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Each requires the coverage type plus costs. The plan provides for each: a description and explicit monthly and annual costs. Health coverage includes physical and mental with costs; property coverage specifies home/contents with costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists services with costs; total_budget provides monthly and annual totals. Therefore, all items are present and fully specified with required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for health coverage, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property coverage, and LifeFirst Standard Plan for travel coverage. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under the appropriate categories: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical/mental health combined is listed under both physical and mental, but the selected health coverage references the health plan; the LifeFirst Standard Plan rating under primary health physical is 8), InsurePlus Standard Coverage under property_protection.home_content has rating 7, and LifeFirst Standard Plan under mobility_coverage.travel_insurance has rating 7.
